title: Compiler crashes when a constant function calls undefined function

features.name: constant function with return calling undefined function
features.description: Code should include a function with a return statement that calls an undefined function, used in a constant evaluation context
features.snippet:
function [31:0] func1(input [31:0] x); return undef_func(x); endfunction
localparam X = func1(1);

features.name: return statement in constant function
features.description: Code should include a function using the return keyword (SystemVerilog style) to return a value from an undefined function call
features.snippet: function [31:0] func1(input [31:0] x); return undef_func(x); endfunction
